title: Assistant (DeepSeek)
hint: About this SmartAccess server only: addresses, flats, subscribers & app, keys, access events (plog). Not for generic trivia—the assistant uses your DB and ClickHouse.

quick.title: Quick Scenarios
quick.hint: Click a link to send a starter prompt immediately.
quick.houseOverviewPrompt: Build a house overview: flats, subscribers, mobile users, keys, intercoms, cameras, and events for last 7 days. If house_id is unknown, resolve house by address first.
quick.subscriberTimelinePrompt: Build subscriber timeline: profile, flats, devices, keys, and latest access events for last 30 days. If needed, find subscriber by phone first.
quick.keyUsagePrompt: Create key usage report: which RFID keys were used, where they opened, last seen, and opening types for last 14 days in selected house.
quick.mobileFunnelPrompt: Show mobile access funnel: mobile accounts, devices, and active app users (event=4) for 7 and 30 days.
quick.crossHousePrompt: Find subscriber by phone and show presence across all houses: flats, keys, and opening activity.
quick.entranceLoadPrompt: Show load by entrances/intercoms for period: event counts, peaks, and opening-type distribution.
quick.flatRiskPrompt: Build flat risk profile for a house: unusual opening frequency, night activity, spikes by code/RFID.
quick.anomaliesPrompt: Find house anomalies for last 14 days and return a fact-based list with explanations.
quick.apiRightsPrompt: Show available API methods for current user and what rights are missing for full analytics.
quick.schemaAuditPrompt: Show key tables and relationships for houses, flats, subscribers, keys, and events; include fields used by current tools.

deepseekUnreachable: Could not reach DeepSeek. Check API key and server network.
